    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import {\n  addFormRoute,\n  detailsRoute,\n  contactLogsRoute,\n  editFormRoute,\n  viewFormRoute,\n} from \"lib/router\";\nimport { Outlet, Route, Routes } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContactAdd } from \"./add\";\nimport { ContactEdit } from \"./edit\";\nimport { ContactsLazy } from \"./lazy\";\nimport { ContactView } from \"./view/details\";\nimport { ContactBase } from \"./view\";\nimport { ContactLogs } from \"./view/logs\";\n\nexport const ContactsModule = () =\u003e {\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cRoutes\u003e\n        \u003cRoute index element={\u003cContactsLazy /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={editFormRoute.template} element={\u003cContactEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={viewFormRoute.template} element={\u003cContactBase /\u003e}\u003e\n          \u003cRoute index element={\u003cContactView /\u003e} /\u003e\n          \u003cRoute path={detailsRoute.template} element={\u003cContactView /\u003e} /\u003e\n          \u003cRoute path={contactLogsRoute.template} element={\u003cContactLogs /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003c/Route\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={addFormRoute.template} element={\u003cContactAdd /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Routes\u003e\n      \u003cOutlet /\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  );\n};",

        "originalContents": "import {\n  addFormRoute,\n  detailsRoute,\n  contactLogsRoute,\n  editFormRoute,\n  viewFormRoute,\n} from \"lib/router\";\nimport { Outlet, Route, Routes } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContactAdd } from \"./add\";\nimport { ContactEdit } from \"./edit\";\nimport { ContactsLazy } from \"./lazy\";\nimport { ContactView } from \"./view/details\";\nimport { ContactBase } from \"./view\";\nimport { ContactLogs } from \"./view/logs\";\n\nexport const ContactsModule = () =\u003e {\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cRoutes\u003e\n        \u003cRoute index element={\u003cContactsLazy /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={editFormRoute.template} element={\u003cContactEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={viewFormRoute.template} element={\u003cContactBase /\u003e}\u003e\n          \u003cRoute index element={\u003cContactView /\u003e} /\u003e\n          \u003cRoute path={detailsRoute.template} element={\u003cContactView /\u003e} /\u003e\n          \u003cRoute path={contactLogsRoute.template} element={\u003cContactLogs /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003c/Route\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={addFormRoute.template} element={\u003cContactAdd /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Routes\u003e\n      \u003cOutlet /\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  );\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { Outlet, Route, Routes, Navigate } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { Dashboard } from \".\";\nimport { useConfig } from \"@providers/config-provider\";\nimport { getDashboardAvailability } from \"@features/dashboard/availability\";\nimport { defaultModuleRoute } from \"@lib/router\";\n\nexport const DashboardModule = () =\u003e {\n  useRequestContext(); // for possible future use\n  const { config, loading } = useConfig();\n  const availability = getDashboardAvailability(config?.entities);\n\n  if (!loading \u0026\u0026 !availability.hasAny) {\n    return \u003cNavigate to={defaultModuleRoute} replace /\u003e;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cRoutes\u003e\n        \u003cRoute index element={\u003cDashboard /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Routes\u003e\n      \u003cOutlet /\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  );\n};",

        "originalContents": "import { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { Outlet, Route, Routes, Navigate } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { Dashboard } from \".\";\nimport { useConfig } from \"@providers/config-provider\";\nimport { getDashboardAvailability } from \"@features/dashboard/availability\";\nimport { defaultModuleRoute } from \"@lib/router\";\n\nexport const DashboardModule = () =\u003e {\n  useRequestContext(); // for possible future use\n  const { config, loading } = useConfig();\n  const availability = getDashboardAvailability(config?.entities);\n\n  if (!loading \u0026\u0026 !availability.hasAny) {\n    return \u003cNavigate to={defaultModuleRoute} replace /\u003e;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cRoutes\u003e\n        \u003cRoute index element={\u003cDashboard /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Routes\u003e\n      \u003cOutlet /\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  );\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport const ModuleLoader = () =\u003e {\n  const { moduleName } = useRouteParams(coreModuleRoute);\n\n  return (\n    \u003cModuleWrapperProvider\u003e\n      \u003cErrorBoundary FallbackComponent={ErrorBoundaryFallbackPage} resetKeys={[moduleName]}\u003e\n        \u003cSuspense fallback=\"Loading...\"\u003e\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.content \u0026\u0026 \u003cContentModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.contacts \u0026\u0026 \u003cContactsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.unsubscribes \u0026\u0026 \u003cUnsubscribesModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.links \u0026\u0026 \u003cLinksModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.comments \u0026\u0026 \u003cCommentsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.accounts \u0026\u0026 \u003cAccountsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.orders \u0026\u0026 \u003cOrdersModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.domains \u0026\u0026 \u003cDomainsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.segments \u0026\u0026 \u003cSegmentsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.users \u0026\u0026 \u003cUserModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.about \u0026\u0026 \u003cAboutModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.emailTemplates \u0026\u0026 \u003cEmailTemplatesModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.activityLogs \u0026\u0026 \u003cActivityLogModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.dashboard \u0026\u0026 \u003cDashboardModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.media \u0026\u0026 \u003cMediaModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.settings \u0026\u0026 \u003cSettingsModule /\u003e}\n          {!moduleName \u0026\u0026 \u003cNavigate to={defaultModuleRoute} replace /\u003e}\n        \u003c/Suspense\u003e\n      \u003c/ErrorBoundary\u003e\n    \u003c/ModuleWrapperProvider\u003e\n  );\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import {\n  addFormRoute,\n  detailsRoute,\n  contactLogsRoute,\n  editFormRoute,\n  viewFormRoute,\n} from \"lib/router\";\nimport { Outlet, Route, Routes } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContactAdd } from \"./add\";\nimport { ContactEdit } from \"./edit\";\nimport { ContactsLazy } from \"./lazy\";\nimport { ContactView } from \"./view/details\";\nimport { ContactBase } from \"./view\";\nimport { ContactLogs } from \"./view/logs\";\n\nexport const ContactsModule = () =\u003e {\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cRoutes\u003e\n        \u003cRoute index element={\u003cContactsLazy /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={editFormRoute.template} element={\u003cContactEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={viewFormRoute.template} element={\u003cContactBase /\u003e}\u003e\n          \u003cRoute index element={\u003cContactView /\u003e} /\u003e\n          \u003cRoute path={detailsRoute.template} element={\u003cContactView /\u003e} /\u003e\n          \u003cRoute path={contactLogsRoute.template} element={\u003cContactLogs /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003c/Route\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={addFormRoute.template} element={\u003cContactAdd /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Routes\u003e\n      \u003cOutlet /\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  );\n};",

        "originalContents": "import { Parser, route, intParser } from \"typesafe-routes\";\n\nexport const enum CoreModule {\n  dashboard = \"dashboard\",\n  contacts = \"contacts\",\n  links = \"links\",\n  comments = \"comments\",\n  content = \"content\",\n  media = \"media\",\n  accounts = \"accounts\",\n  orders = \"orders\",\n  deals = \"deals\",\n  domains = \"domains\",\n  segments = \"segments\",\n  unsubscribes = \"unsubscribes\",\n  users = \"users\",\n  about = \"about\",\n  emailTemplates = \"email-templates\",\n  activityLogs = \"activity-logs\",\n  settings = \"settings\",\n}",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport const Accounts = () =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const [gridSettings, setGridSettings] = useLocalStorage\u003cDataListSettings | undefined\u003e(\n    accountGridSettingsStorageKey,\n    undefined\n  );\n\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(gridSettings?.searchTerm ?? \"\");\n  const [openImport, setOpenImport] = useState(false);\n  const [openExport, setOpenExport] = useState(false);\n  const [columnsPanelOpen, setColumnsPanelOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [filterPanelOpen, setFilterPanelOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [importFieldsObject, setImportFieldsObject] = useState\u003cany\u003e();\n  const dataExportQuery = useRef(\"\");\n\n  const getAccountList = async (mainQuery: string, exportQuery?: string) =\u003e {\n    try {\n      dataExportQuery.current = exportQuery || \"\";\n      const result = await client.api.accountsList({\n        query: mainQuery,\n      });\n      return result;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.log(error);\n      return null;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const accountsExportApi: (query: string, accept: string) =\u003e Promise\u003cResponse\u003e = (query, accept) =\u003e\n    client.api.accountsExportList({ query }, { headers: { Accept: accept } });\n\n  const handleImportOpen = () =\u003e {\n    !importFieldsObject \u0026\u0026 setImportFieldsObject(getModelByName(modelName));\n    setOpenImport(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleImportClose = () =\u003e {\n    setOpenImport(false);\n  };\n\n  const handleExportOpen = () =\u003e {\n    openExport ? setOpenExport(false) : setOpenExport(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleFileUpload = async (data: Result\u003cstring\u003e) =\u003e {\n    const importDtoCollection: AccountImportDto[] = data.validData;\n    await client.api.accountsImportCreate(importDtoCollection);\n  };",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { GenericFormProps, getSchemaDto } from \"@components/generic-components\";\nimport { DomainCreateDto, DomainDetailsDto, DomainUpdateDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport {\n  addFormRoute,\n  CoreModule,\n  editFormRoute,\n  getCoreModuleRoute,\n  viewFormRoute,\n} from \"lib/router\";\nimport { Outlet, Route, Routes, useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { DomainsLazy } from \"./lazy\";\nimport swaggerJson from \"@lib/network/swagger.json\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { DomainForm } from \"./form\";\n\nexport const DomainsModule = () =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n\n  const formProps: GenericFormProps\u003cDomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto\u003e = {\n    detailsSchema: getSchemaDto(\"DomainDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    updateSchema: getSchemaDto(\"DomainUpdateDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    createSchema: getSchemaDto(\"DomainCreateDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    editable: false,\n    getItemFn: client.api.domainsDetail,\n    updateItemFn: client.api.domainsPartialUpdate,\n    createItemFn: client.api.domainsCreate,\n    getItemId: () =\u003e undefined,\n  };\n\n  const deleteProps = {\n    header: \"Data Management\",\n    description: \"Please be aware that what has been deleted can never be brought back.\",\n    entity: \"domain\",\n    listRoute: CoreModule.domains,\n    deleteItemFn: client.api.domainsDelete,\n  };\n\n  const viewFormProps: GenericFormProps\u003cDomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto\u003e = {\n    ...formProps,\n    mode: \"details\",\n    editable: false,\n    deleteOptionProps: deleteProps,\n    getItemId: () =\u003e {\n      const params = useParams();\n      return Number(params \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"] \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/view$/)?.[1]);\n    },\n  };",

        "originalContents": "import { GenericFormProps, getSchemaDto } from \"@components/generic-components\";\nimport { DomainCreateDto, DomainDetailsDto, DomainUpdateDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport {\n  addFormRoute,\n  CoreModule,\n  editFormRoute,\n  getCoreModuleRoute,\n  viewFormRoute,\n} from \"lib/router\";\nimport { Outlet, Route, Routes, useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { DomainsLazy } from \"./lazy\";\nimport swaggerJson from \"@lib/network/swagger.json\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { DomainForm } from \"./form\";\n\nexport const DomainsModule = () =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n\n  const formProps: GenericFormProps\u003cDomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto\u003e = {\n    detailsSchema: getSchemaDto(\"DomainDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    updateSchema: getSchemaDto(\"DomainUpdateDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    createSchema: getSchemaDto(\"DomainCreateDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    editable: false,\n    getItemFn: client.api.domainsDetail,\n    updateItemFn: client.api.domainsPartialUpdate,\n    createItemFn: client.api.domainsCreate,\n    getItemId: () =\u003e undefined,\n  };\n\n  const deleteProps = {\n    header: \"Data Management\",\n    description: \"Please be aware that what has been deleted can never be brought back.\",\n    entity: \"domain\",\n    listRoute: CoreModule.domains,\n    deleteItemFn: client.api.domainsDelete,\n  };\n\n  const viewFormProps: GenericFormProps\u003cDomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto\u003e = {\n    ...formProps,\n    mode: \"details\",\n    editable: false,\n    deleteOptionProps: deleteProps,\n    getItemId: () =\u003e {\n      const params = useParams();\n      return Number(params \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"] \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/view$/)?.[1]);\n    },\n  };",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { ModuleWrapper } from \"@components/module-wrapper\";\nimport { AccountDetailsDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { Divider, ListItem, ListItemAvatar, Tab, Tabs } from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Outlet, useLocation, useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { accountFormBreadcrumbLinks } from \"../constants\";\nimport { AccountNameListItemTextLarge, AccountUrlHref, AvatarContainer } from \"../index.styled\";\n\n// Prevent duplicate network calls (e.g., in React StrictMode) by caching fetched accounts in-memory\nconst accountDetailsCache = new Map\u003cnumber, AccountDetailsDto\u003e();\n\nexport const AccountViewBase = () =\u003e {\n  const { state } = useLocation();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const params = useParams();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const [tabValue, setTabValue] = useState(\"details\");\n  const [account, setAccount] = useState\u003cAccountDetailsDto | null\u003e(\n    (state as AccountDetailsDto) || null\n  );\n  const didFetchRef = useRef(false);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const load = async () =\u003e {\n      if (account || didFetchRef.current) return;\n      const id = params.id ? Number(params.id) : undefined;\n      if (!id) return;\n      try {\n        // First, try cache to avoid duplicate fetches across remounts\n        const cached = accountDetailsCache.get(id);\n        if (cached) {\n          setAccount(cached);\n          return;\n        }\n        didFetchRef.current = true;\n        const { data } = await client.api.accountsDetail(id);\n        accountDetailsCache.set(id, data);\n        setAccount(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        // noop; fall back to minimal header\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    };\n    load();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [params.id]);",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "import { ModuleWrapper } from \"@components/module-wrapper\";\nimport { AccountDetailsDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { Divider, ListItem, ListItemAvatar, Tab, Tabs } from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Outlet, useLocation, useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { accountFormBreadcrumbLinks } from \"../constants\";\nimport { AccountNameListItemTextLarge, AccountUrlHref, AvatarContainer } from \"../index.styled\";\n\n// Prevent duplicate network calls (e.g., in React StrictMode) by caching fetched accounts in-memory\nconst accountDetailsCache = new Map\u003cnumber, AccountDetailsDto\u003e();\n\nexport const AccountViewBase = () =\u003e {\n  const { state } = useLocation();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const params = useParams();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const [tabValue, setTabValue] = useState(\"details\");\n  const [account, setAccount] = useState\u003cAccountDetailsDto | null\u003e(\n    (state as AccountDetailsDto) || null\n  );\n  const didFetchRef = useRef(false);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const load = async () =\u003e {\n      if (account || didFetchRef.current) return;\n      const id = params.id ? Number(params.id) : undefined;\n      if (!id) return;\n      try {\n        // First, try cache to avoid duplicate fetches across remounts\n        const cached = accountDetailsCache.get(id);\n        if (cached) {\n          setAccount(cached);\n          return;\n        }\n        didFetchRef.current = true;\n        const { data } = await client.api.accountsDetail(id);\n        accountDetailsCache.set(id, data);\n        setAccount(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        // noop; fall back to minimal header\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    };\n    load();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [params.id]);",
        "range": {

}

## Summary

1. **Created lazy loading files** for modules that didn't have them:
   - `content/lazy.tsx`
   - `links/lazy.tsx`
   - `comments/lazy.tsx`
   - `unsubscribes/lazy.tsx`
   - `users/lazy.tsx`
   - `about/lazy.tsx`
   - `segments/lazy.tsx`
   - `email-templates/lazy.tsx`
   - `activity-log/lazy.tsx`

2. **Updated existing lazy files** to export the module name (for module-loader) while keeping the list component exports (for internal use):
   - `contacts/lazy.tsx` - exports both `ContactsModule` and `ContactsLazy`
   - `accounts/lazy.tsx` - exports both `AccountsModule` and `AccountsLazy`
   - `orders/lazy.tsx` - exports both `OrdersModule` and `OrdersLazy`
   - `domains/lazy.tsx` - exports both `DomainsModule` and `DomainsLazy`
   - `dashboard/lazy.tsx` - updated to export `DashboardModule`

3. **Updated module-loader** to import all modules from their lazy files, so all modules are now lazy-loaded.

All modules are now lazy-loaded using React's `lazy()` function. The existing `Suspense` wrapper handles loading states. This should reduce the initial bundle size and improve load time, since modules are only loaded when needed.
